## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .`.
- [ ] Ran `uv run pyrefly check && uv run ty check --error-on-warning`.
- [ ] Ran `uv run pytest -q`.
- [ ] Updated `README.md`, `docs/`, and `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing.
